summary: Reports Section — full E2E verification. Backend: 23/23 pytest pass (9 framework + 14 new API E2E). Frontend: all critical flows verified via Playwright — landing page (10 reports, 4 categories), viewer with columns/filters/pagination, non-PHI CSV export end-to-end with download URL + token, saved views CRUD, PHI export 403 gate with proper user-facing error, and PIN/password reauth dialog. No regressions found.
critical_code_review_comments: services/reports/builtin.py is 904 lines — consider splitting per-category (clinical/financial/compliance/operational) for maintainability, but not a blocker.

Report run cache key mixes user id only when tenant_scope_all is False — reasonable, but make sure PHI previews are not cached across users. Current design caches per-user when not scope_all; acceptable.
ExportRequest uses pattern='^(csv|excel|pdf)$' — matches export_formats declared in public metadata. Good.
test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (requires /api/auth/reauth after login; UI ReauthDialog supports 'Use password instead' link)
seed_data_creation: Test saved view named TEST_UIView_1 created via UI and 1 via pytest; pytest test deletes its own view. UI test view left behind — safe to ignore or cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports nav entry lives at /reports. Reauth cookie is mandatory for all /api/reports/* and /api/exports/*. For curl: POST /api/auth/login then POST /api/auth/reauth {password}. Tenant context may set X-Tenant-Id/X-Location-Id automatically from platform admin context. PHI reports (patient_roster, appointments_list, claims_list, invoices_list, payments_received, unsigned_clinical_notes) require reporting.export_phi for export which admin/super_admin DOES NOT hold by design.

verification_summary.GET /api/reports/catalog: PASS (10 reports across 4 categories for admin)
verification_summary.POST /api/reports/{name}/run: PASS for appointments_list, claims_list, audit_activity, provider_productivity, invoices_list, denials_log
verification_summary.POST /api/reports/denials_log/export (no: PASS — status transitions to ready, CSV streams with attachment disposition and text/csv mime
verification_summary.POST /api/reports/patient_roster/export: PASS — 403 with 'Exports of PHI reports require reporting.export_phi permission.'
verification_summary.Saved views CRUD: PASS (create 201, list, patch is_default+name, delete 204, list absent)
